title: Dirty Worktree Contract Sweep
findings: 已读取 existing registry，重点核对 ISS-20260609-001..059；读取 dirty-files.txt 与 fabric-doctor.txt，并用 git status/diff/ls-files 交叉确认。dirty-files.txt 仅列 .workflow/issues/issues.jsonl，当前 packages/cli 与 packages/shared 范围内无未提交 modified/staged/untracked product 文件，因此没有可落到 product file:line 的新增 contract/schema/snapshot/i18n/parity inconsistency。
